headline: Why Intuit (INTU) Is Up 17.6% After Strong Q2, Dividend Hike, and Anthropic AI Deal – And What's Next
summary: In late February 2026, Intuit reported higher Q2 and first-half results year over year, reaffirmed full-year guidance, raised its quarterly dividend to US$1.20 per share, and outlined expectations for Q3 and full-year operating income and earnings per share. A multi-year partnership with Anthropic to embed custom AI agents across Intuit’s platform and surface Intuit’s financial tools inside Claude products adds a new dimension to how the company can integrate AI into tax, accounting, and...
